name: Ardency: Heart of the Rebellion
short_description: A fantasy otome game full of love, friendship, and betrayal. In the heat of war, will your love turn the tides of battle?
detailed_description:
Join the ranks of the esteemed Royal Rangers, devoted protectors of the kingdom of Allton. As tensions rise with the neighboring elven realm of Kedarn, your role has become more vital than ever before. Brace yourself for a thrilling turn of events as your company captures an intriguing elven prisoner like no other.

This enigmatic individual will challenge your perceptions and force you to make crucial choices. Will you explore the realm of romance, forging deep connections with your fellow rangers? Or will friendship be your guiding light in these uncertain times? But beware, for lurking in the shadows is the potential for betrayal, putting your loyalties to the ultimate test.

The fate of the kingdom rests upon your shoulders as you unravel the mysteries that lie ahead. Are you prepared to shape history and become a legend in your own right? The choice is yours to make.


Twelve unlockable CG's
Four love interests
100-120k words of indepth story
Tons of choices for you to make that affect the story and how your character acts
